EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is correctly identified; the mismatch in author name is due to a character encoding variation in the umlaut of the name Brüschweiler.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10858-012-9659-4
FOUND_TITLE: PPM: a side-chain and backbone chemical shift predictor for the assessment of protein conformational ensembles
FOUND_AUTHORS: Da-Wei Li, Rafael Brüschweiler
FOUND_YEAR: 2012
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
